texto: I haven't yet discovered what my first language is so for the time being I use English words in order to say things: I expect I will always have to do it that way
autor: regrettably I don't think my first language can be written down at all.
explicacao: Orientação direta de regrettably I don't think my first language can be written down at all. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I haven't yet discovered what my first language is so for the time being I use English words in o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, claire-louise-bennett, pond, útil em momentos de pond.
